title: Creating the Equation
text: Write a linear equation in the form: P(t)=mt+P0​

title: Identifying the Slope
text: Since the population increases by $$1700$$ people each year, the value of slope $$m$$ is $$1700$$.

title: Identifying the Intercept
text: Since the population in the base year (2003, when $$t=0)$$ is $$45000$$, the value of the initial value P0 is $$45000$$.

title: Plugging into the Formula
text: Substitute the values of $$m$$ and P0 into P(t), we get the equation P(t).
